detected_issue.description: The Pipeline JRuby extension manages execution, metrics, security, and DLQ logic.
detected_issue.reasoning: This class is responsible for compiling the Pipeline IR, initializing complex flow metrics, managing the lifecycle of the Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) writer, handling secret store integration, and providing health status details. It mixes high-level execution logic with specific infrastructural concerns like security (SecretStore) and diagnostics (Metrics/Health).
